final_text:
{
  "test_strategy": "The testing strategy will include functional testing, API testing, security testing, integration testing, and regression testing. The strategy will be executed in a staged approach, with continuous integration and deployment. Automated tests will be used wherever possible to ensure efficiency and coverage.",
  "functional_test_scenarios": [
    "Verify customer registration process",
    "Test loan application submission",
    "Validate loan approval workflow",
    "Check loan disbursement functionality",
    "Ensure loan repayment processing works correctly"
  ],
  "api_test_scenarios": [
    "Test User API endpoints for CRUD operations",
    "Validate Loan API endpoints for loan application and approval",
    "Check Payment API endpoints for payment processing"
  ],
  "security_test_scenarios": [
    "Verify OAuth 2.0 authentication process",
    "Check for encryption of sensitive data at rest and in transit",
    "Test for rate limiting and IP whitelisting to prevent brute force attacks"
  ],
  "integration_test_scenarios": [
    "Test integration with third-party credit check service",
    "Validate integration with payment gateway"
  ],
  "regression_test_scenarios": [
    "Re-run functional tests after each deployment to ensure no new bugs are introduced",
    "Re-run security tests to ensure security measures are intact"
  ],
  "qa_notes": [
    "Ensure detailed test cases and environment setup instructions are provided for QA handoff.",
    "Document the CI/CD pipeline and deployment scripts for deployment handoff."
  ]
}
